description: Analyze the zinc coordination environment in Human Carbonic Anhydrase II using the loaded PDB structure 1CA2. Identify the zinc ion and its coordinating ligands (protein residues and water molecules within ~2.5 Angstroms). Measure all zinc-ligand bond distances. Create a publication-quality figure of the active site showing the zinc ion, coordinating residues as labeled sticks, and distance measurements as dashed lines. Save the rendered figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/ca2_zinc_coordination.png. Additionally, write a coordination report to ~/PyMOL_Data/ca2_zinc_report.txt that includes: 1) The identity of each coordinating residue/ligand (including residue numbers), 2) Each measured Zn-ligand distance in Angstroms, 3) The coordination geometry type (e.g., tetrahedral, octahedral, etc.), and 4) The total number of coordinating ligands.
